description: CompositionWhite T-shirt made of 100% polyester, engineered with moisture wicking technology, has a modified round neck, short sleeves, strategically placed mesh panels and thread detailingFittingRegularWash careWash and iron inside outGentle machine wash at 40 degreesDo not bleachTumble dry lowWarm ironDo not dry cleanCrafted for the sport freaks, this polyester T-shirt from puma is designed with moisture management technology that draws sweat away from the skin and keeps you fresh and dry all through your gruelling training sessions. Team it with shorts, tracks or jeans.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
